name: Jellyzer
overview: Translates Jellyfin item metadata using a local AI (LM Studio / OpenAI-compatible endpoint).
description: Jellyzer lets you translate movie and TV show metadata (title, overview, tagline) directly from the Jellyfin plugin settings page. Pick a library item, choose your language pair, and the translated metadata is written back to the database instantly. Uses any OpenAI-compatible API – LM Studio running locally is the default.
